channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Karol G Sees Streaming Boom Following Coachella Performance
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to our podcast, where we dive into the latest music trends. This week, we're talking about Karol G's incredible performance at Coachella. She made history as the first Latina headliner, and her streaming numbers are soaring. Let's take a closer look."
[Soft music transitions in the background]
Host: "According to Luminate, Karol G's songs generated 40.5 million on-demand streams in the US during the week of April 10-16. That's a 34% boost from the previous week. And it's not just her overall streaming numbers that are impressive - four of her songs from her Coachella setlist have re-entered the Billboard Hot Latin Songs chart."
[Music transitions to a brief clip of Karol G's song]
Host: "Leading the way is her former number one hit, 'Si Antes Te Hubiera Conocido', which is back at number six on the chart. The song saw a 26% growth in streams, with 3.8 million official chart-contributing streams. And it's not just her Latin chart performance that's impressive - the song is also climbing the Billboard Global 200 chart, up 153-115, and the Global Excl. US chart, up 124-109."
[Music transitions back to the host]
Host: "Other songs from Karol G's setlist are also seeing a surge in popularity. 'Latina Foreva' is up 57% with 2.2 million streams, 'Amargura' is up 34% with 2 million streams, and 'Provenza' is up 29% with 1.9 million streams. We'll have to wait and see how her second weekend performance at Coachella affects her streaming numbers, but for now, it's clear that Karol G is on top of her game."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's all for today's episode. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next one."
